story.title: Our Story
story.content: We connect farmers from the pristine mountains of Sankhuwasabha directly to your home. Our sweet, mineral-rich jaggery is made using traditional methods completely devoid of bleach or artificial coloring. By choosing SakharSansar, you are not only savoring an authentic taste but also supporting rural livelihoods.

farmers.name: Ram Bahadur
farmers.story: Farming sugarcane for 20 years, Ram uses organic techniques to produce the sweetest yields.

products.name: Organic Jaggery Block
products.description: Natural, rich in minerals, and slowly cooked over wood-fire for a distinct earthy flavor.
products.longDescription: Our signature Organic Jaggery Block is the purest form of traditional gur from Sankhuwasabha. Each block is hand-poured from slow-cooked sugarcane juice over open wood fires, preserving every mineral and nutrient that refined sugar strips away. The deep amber color and complex caramel flavor come entirely from nature — zero additives, zero bleach, zero compromise. Perfect for daily tea, cooking, or enjoying as a wholesome after-meal treat.
products.shelfLife: 6-12 months when stored in a cool, dry place

products.name: Jaggery Powder
products.description: Finely ground natural jaggery powder, ideal for baking, desserts, and sweetening beverages.
products.longDescription: Our Jaggery Powder is made by carefully crushing hand-crafted jaggery blocks into a fine, free-flowing powder. It dissolves instantly in hot or cold liquids, making it the perfect everyday replacement for refined sugar. Use it in your morning tea, sprinkle it over oatmeal, or fold it into cookie dough for a rich, caramel depth that white sugar simply cannot match. Every grain retains the full mineral profile of our farm-fresh sugarcane.
products.shelfLife: 6 months when stored in an airtight container

products.name: Jaggery Cubes
products.description: Pre-portioned bite-sized cubes for effortless sweetening — drop one in your cup and enjoy.
products.longDescription: Perfectly portioned for convenience, our Jaggery Cubes take the guesswork out of sweetening. Each cube is hand-cut from our signature jaggery blocks to a consistent size, so you get the same rich sweetness every time. Drop one into your tea or coffee, pack a few as a travel snack, or crush them over desserts. The compact format also makes them an ideal gift — a taste of the Himalayas, ready to share.
products.shelfLife: 6-12 months when stored in a cool, dry place

products.name: Liquid Jaggery
products.description: A smooth, pourable syrup of pure jaggery — drizzle over pancakes, yogurt, or warm milk.
products.longDescription: Our Liquid Jaggery is a velvety, golden syrup made by gently reducing fresh sugarcane juice to a thick, pourable consistency. Unlike commercial syrups loaded with corn starch and artificial flavoring, ours is single-ingredient and chemical-free. Drizzle it over pancakes, swirl it into yogurt, mix it into warm milk before bed, or use it as a natural glaze for roasted vegetables. The bottle comes with a controlled-pour cap for mess-free use.

testimonials.name: Aarati Sharma
testimonials.review: Very pure and tasty jaggery! Makes my morning tea perfectly balanced without any guilt.

testimonials.name: Bidhan Shrestha
testimonials.review: The authenticity is real. Tastes exactly like what my grandmother used to make. Highly recommended!

benefits.title: Rich in Minerals
benefits.desc: Contains essential minerals like Iron, Magnesium, and Zinc, supporting bone and heart health.

benefits.title: Improves Digestion
benefits.desc: Activates digestive enzymes, acting as a natural body cleanser after meals.

benefits.title: Energy Booster
benefits.desc: Provides gradual energy without spikes, preventing the sudden fatigue caused by refined sugar.

benefits.title: Immunity Support
benefits.desc: Loaded with antioxidants and nutrients that help build a stronger immune system naturally.

faqs.question: How is your jaggery different from market jaggery?
faqs.answer: Our jaggery is 100% chemical-free. We do not use sulfur, bleach, or synthetic colors during the boiling process, ensuring you get the pure sugarcane extract in its most natural form.

faqs.question: What is the shelf life of the jaggery?
faqs.answer: Store it in a cool, dark, and dry place in an airtight container. Properly preserved, it can easily last 6-12 months without losing its flavor or nutritional value.

faqs.question: Can diabetic patients consume jaggery?
faqs.answer: While healthier and more nutritious than refined sugar, jaggery is still a sweetener with a high glycemic index. We recommend diabetic individuals consult their physician before adding it to their diet.

faqs.question: Do you deliver pan-Nepal?
faqs.answer: Yes! We ship directly from Sankhuwasabha to major cities across Nepal. Shipping times vary depending on your location.

waysToEnjoy.title: Morning Tea & Coffee
waysToEnjoy.desc: Replace your daily refined sugar with a small piece of our jaggery for a caramel-like sweet start.

waysToEnjoy.title: Traditional Sweets
waysToEnjoy.desc: Perfect for making authentic local desserts like Sel Roti or Kheer.

waysToEnjoy.title: Direct Snack
waysToEnjoy.desc: Eat a small chunk directly after meals to promote healthy digestion.
